title: mycobactopia-org/mtbc-varcaller-nf pipeline - params.input schema
description: Samplesheet schema. MAGMA-compatible per-library shape (study, sample, library, r1, r2, platform). The XBS gatk_vqsr backend consumes this directly. See docs/CONTRACT.md.

study.errorMessage: Study name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

library.errorMessage: Library name must be provided and cannot contain spaces; one row per library when a sample has multiple

r1.errorMessage: Read 1 FASTQ must exist, cannot contain spaces, and must end in .fq.gz or .fastq.gz

r2.errorMessage: Read 2 FASTQ must exist, cannot contain spaces, and must end in .fq.gz or .fastq.gz
